verses.1: For the music director. A Psalm of David. LORD, You have searched me and known me.
verses.2: You know when I sit down and when I get up; You understand my thought from far away.
verses.3: You scrutinize my path and my lying down, And are acquainted with all my ways.
verses.4: Even before there is a word on my tongue, Behold, LORD, You know it all.
verses.5: You have encircled me behind and in front, And placed Your hand upon me.
verses.6: Such knowledge is too wonderful for me; It is too high, I cannot comprehend it.
verses.7: Where can I go from Your Spirit? Or where can I flee from Your presence?
verses.8: If I ascend to heaven, You are there; If I make my bed in Sheol, behold, You are there.
verses.9: If I take up the wings of the dawn, If I dwell in the remotest part of the sea,
verses.10: Even there Your hand will lead me, And Your right hand will take hold of me.
verses.11: If I say, “Surely the darkness will overwhelm me, And the light around me will be night,”
verses.12: Even darkness is not dark to You, And the night is as bright as the day. Darkness and light are alike to You.
verses.13: For You created my innermost parts; You wove me in my mother’s womb.
verses.14: I will give thanks to You, because I am awesomely and wonderfully made; Wonderful are Your works, And my soul knows it very well.
verses.15: My frame was not hidden from You When I was made in secret, And skillfully formed in the depths of the earth;
verses.16: Your eyes have seen my formless substance; And in Your book were written All the days that were ordained for me, When as yet there was not one of them.
verses.17: How precious also are Your thoughts for me, God! How vast is the sum of them!
verses.18: Were I to count them, they would outnumber the sand. When I awake, I am still with You.
verses.19: If only You would put the wicked to death, God; Leave me, you men of bloodshed.
verses.20: For they speak against You wickedly, And Your enemies take Your name in vain.
verses.21: Do I not hate those who hate You, LORD? And do I not loathe those who rise up against You?
verses.22: I hate them with the utmost hatred; They have become my enemies.
verses.23: Search me, God, and know my heart; Put me to the test and know my anxious thoughts;
verses.24: And see if there is any hurtful way in me, And lead me in the everlasting way.
